Earrings Footer

Tanishq – India’s Leading Jewellery Brand

Tanishq, a name synonymous with exquisite craftsmanship and timeless design, is India's leading jewellery brand. We celebrate the rich heritage of Indian jewellery while keeping pace with contemporary trends.

Jewellery for Every Occasion

Whether you're celebrating a joyous festival, a personal milestone, or simply adding a touch of elegance to your everyday look, Tanishq offers the perfect piece for every occasion.

Types of Jewellery

Discover a world of possibilities through different types of jewellery - with our diverse collection of necklaces, earrings, rings, bracelets & bangles, pendants, nosepins, and mangalsutras. The Nav-raani gold jewellery collections here at Tanishq are home to some of the most breathtaking gold jewellery pieces and sets, and is inspired by true Indian royalty from the day of old.

Necklaces

From delicate chains to statement pieces, find the perfect necklace to elevate your look.

Earrings

Add a touch of sparkle with our extensive collection of earrings from classic studs to elaborate danglers.

Rings

Find the perfect symbol of love, commitment, or personal achievement with our exquisite collection of rings

Bracelets & Bangles

Embrace tradition or add a modern touch with our diverse range of bracelets and bangles

Pendants

Personalize your look or celebrate a special occasion with a captivating pendant

Nosepins & Mangalsutras

Explore traditional jewellery like nosepins and mangalsutras, imbued with cultural significance.
Rivaah by Tanishq is also home to an immense array of regional bridal jewellery – whether you’re looking for Tamil wedding looks, Marathi bridal jewellery, or Bengali jewellery– we’ve got it all.

Jewelry for Women and Men

At Tanishq, our stunning collections include awe-inspiring jewellery for women and men

Jewellery for Women

Unleash your inner grace and elegance with our collection of women's jewellery. Choose from classic and timeless designs to bold and contemporary pieces.

Jewellery for Men

Discover a sophisticated selection of jewellery for men to complement your style. From sleek chains to bold statement rings, express your individuality.

The Perfect Gift

For any occasion, you can never go wrong with jewellery for gift purposes. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, or an anniversary, or just showing someone your love, our wide selection has something for everyone – from Mother’s day jewellery to Valentine’s day gifts, to even kids jewellery options.

Tanishq: Certified Quality and Sustainability

At Tanishq, we are committed to providing you with the highest quality jewellery. We constantly work to ensure that the gold, diamonds, and other precious stones utilized in our jewellery pieces are of the greatest caliber. We conduct thorough quality inspections and only ethically purchase our diamonds from reputable, certified, and well-known vendors.

Shop Tanishq Online or In-Store

Explore the world of Tanishq jewellery at your convenience. Browse our extensive collection online or visit one of our many stores in several major cities across India. Our friendly and qualified team is ready to assist you in finding the perfect piece to complement your style and celebrate your special moments.

Find your nearest Tanishq

Jewellery store in Delhi | Jewellery store in Bangalore | Jewellery store in Mumbai | Jewellery store in Chennai | Jewellery store in Gujarat | Jewellery store in Kolkata | Jewellery store in Pune | Jewellery store in Hyderabad | Jewellery store in Patna | Jewellery store in Jaipur | Jewellery stores near me
